metadata.purpose: RAG evaluation question set for Thai Bank Financial Q&A System
metadata.rule: Val set used for tuning only. Test set used ONCE for final RAGAS scores in NB04. Do not tune any parameter based on test questions.

val.question: What was BBL's NPL ratio at the end of 2025?
val.expected_answer: BBL's NPL ratio was 2.98% at the end of 2025.

val.question: What was KBANK's net profit for the full year 2025?
val.expected_answer: KBANK's net profit for the full year 2025 was 49,565 million THB.

val.question: What was TTB's Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) capital ratio as of end 2025?
val.expected_answer: TTB's Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) capital ratio was 17.5% as of end 2025.

val.question: What was TISCO Financial Group's return on equity (ROE) in 2025?
val.expected_answer: TISCO Financial Group's return on equity (ROE) was 15.4% in 2025.

val.question: What were LHFG's total assets at the end of 2025?
val.expected_answer: LHFG's total assets were 398,811 million THB at the end of 2025.

val.question: What was Thai Credit Bank's total loan outstanding at the end of 2025?
val.expected_answer: Thai Credit Bank's total loan outstanding at the end of 2025 was 181,865.6 million THB.

val.question: Which bank had the highest NPL ratio among all 10 banks in 2025?
val.expected_answer: KKP had the highest NPL ratio among all 10 banks in 2025 at 4.3%.

val.question: Which bank reported the highest net profit in 2025?
val.expected_answer: KBANK reported the highest net profit in 2025 at 49,565 million THB.

val.question: Which bank had the lowest cost-to-income ratio in 2025?
val.expected_answer: KTB had the lowest cost-to-income ratio in 2025 at 40.3%.

val.question: How does BBL's return on equity (ROE) compare to KBANK's ROE in 2025? Which was higher and by how much?
val.expected_answer: KBANK had the higher ROE in 2025 at 8.62%, compared to BBL's 8.07%. KBANK outperformed BBL by 55 basis points (0.55 percentage points).

val.question: Which bank had the lowest loan growth rate in 2025?
val.expected_answer: KKP had the lowest loan growth rate in 2025 at -6.7%, meaning its loan portfolio contracted during the year.

val.question: How did KTB's net interest margin (NIM) change from 2024 to 2025? Did it improve or decline?
val.expected_answer: KTB's NIM declined from 3.29% in 2024 to 2.82% in 2025, a decrease of 47 basis points

val.question: Did BAY's NPL ratio improve or worsen from 2024 to 2025? By how many basis points?
val.expected_answer: BAY's NPL ratio slightly worsened from 3.23% in 2024 to 3.26% in 2025, deteriorating by 3 basis points.

val.question: Which banks mentioned the BOT policy rate cut as a key factor affecting net interest margin in 2025?
val.expected_answer: KBANK, KTB, SCBX, TTB, TISCO, BAY, CREDIT, and KKP mentioned the BOT policy rate cut as a key factor affecting their net interest margin in 2025. BBL and LHFG did not explicitly highlight this factor.

val.question: Which banks highlighted digital banking or digital transformation as a key strategic priority in their 2025 annual report?
val.expected_answer: All 10 banks — BBL, KBANK, KTB, SCBX, TTB, TISCO, BAY, LHFG, CREDIT, and KKP — highlighted digital banking or digital transformation as a key strategic priority in their 2025 annual reports.

test.question: What were SCBX's total assets at the end of 2025?
test.expected_answer: SCBX's total assets were 3,651 billion THB at the end of 2025.

test.question: What was BAY's return on assets (ROA) in 2025?
test.expected_answer: BAY's return on assets (ROA) was 1.21% in 2025.

test.question: What was KTB's NPL coverage ratio at the end of 2025?
test.expected_answer: KTB's NPL coverage ratio was 203.6% at the end of 2025.

test.question: What was KKP's Capital Adequacy Ratio (CAR) as of December 31, 2025?
test.expected_answer: KKP's Capital Adequacy Ratio (CAR) was 16.43% as of December 31, 2025.

test.question: Which bank had the highest Capital Adequacy Ratio (CAR) among all 10 banks in 2025?
test.expected_answer: KTB had the highest Capital Adequacy Ratio (CAR) among all 10 banks in 2025 at 22.12%.

test.question: Which bank had the lowest NPL ratio among all 10 banks in 2025?
test.expected_answer: TISCO had the lowest NPL ratio among all 10 banks in 2025 at 2.28%.

test.question: Compare the net interest margin (NIM) of TTB and TISCO for 2025. Which bank had the higher NIM and by how much?
test.expected_answer: TISCO had the higher NIM in 2025 at 4.82%, compared to TTB's 3.04%. TISCO outperformed TTB by 1.78%.

test.question: How did SCBX's total operating income change from 2024 to 2025? Did it grow or decline?
test.expected_answer: SCBX's total operating income slightly declined by 0.5%, falling from 172.4 billion THB in 2024 to 171.6 billion THB in 2025.

test.question: Did BBL's cost-to-income ratio improve or worsen from 2024 to 2025?
test.expected_answer: BBL's cost-to-income ratio worsened slightly from 48.0% in 2024 to 48.4% in 2025, an increase of 0.4%.

test.question: Which banks mentioned household debt quality as a key credit risk concern in their 2025 annual report?
test.expected_answer: All 10 banks — BBL, KBANK, KTB, SCBX, TTB, TISCO, BAY, LHFG, CREDIT, and KKP — mentioned household debt quality as a key credit risk concern in their 2025 annual reports.
